title: P20 roadmap discovery
objective:
Run script:
"""
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if ctx.exists() else ''
lines = [line for line in text.splitlines() if 'Next:' in line or 'Следующая' in line or 'next' in line.lower()]
last_lines = lines[-20:]
state = Path('governance/state/P20_NEXT_ROADMAP_DISCOVERY_FROM_CONTEXT.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'P20','trace_id':'p20_next_roadmap_discovery_from_context','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'agent_context_exists':ctx.exists(),'candidate_next_lines':last_lines,'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'P20B roadmap discovery validation'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/P20_NEXT_ROADMAP_DISCOVERY_FROM_CONTEXT.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# P20 | Next roadmap discovery from AGENT_CONTEXT\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nAGENT_CONTEXT.md scanned for next-task markers. Workflow lock respected; no .github/workflows files touched.\n\n## Candidate next lines\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + line for line in last_lines) + '\n\nNext: P20B roadmap discovery validation.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
if ctx.exists():
    ctx.write_text(text.rstrip() + '\n## P20 completed | 2026-06-04\nNext roadmap discovery from AGENT_CONTEXT completed. Workflow lock respected: no .github/workflows files touched. Next: P20B roadmap discovery validation.\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(ctx))
